vocab.meaning: phản ánh đúng bản chất/phong cách của...
vocab.example: I chose a minimalist mirror because I wanted my home decor to be a true reflection of my personality.

vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.example: I once saw a stunning handcrafted mirror in an antique shop, but it cost an arm and a leg, so I had to walk away.

vocab.meaning: trông vô cùng tuyệt vời/sang trọng
vocab.example: I bought a high-quality vanity mirror to help me ensure I look a million dollars before heading out to special events.

vocab.meaning: được hoàn thiện một cách hoàn hảo
vocab.example: The framing on the mirror I commissioned was done to a turn, exceeding all my expectations.

vocab.meaning: quan sát/để mắt tìm kiếm thứ gì đó
vocab.example: I’m currently keeping an eye out for a full-length mirror that would fit the narrow space in my hallway.

vocab.meaning: thứ tốt nhất trong số những thứ cùng loại
vocab.example: Out of all the home accessories I purchased last month, this vintage mirror is definitely the pick of the bunch.

vocab.meaning: chia tay/từ bỏ một món đồ (thường là để mua cái mới)
vocab.example: It was quite hard to part with my old dressing mirror, but I needed something larger and more modern.

vocab.meaning: tạo ra một sự khác biệt cực kỳ lớn
vocab.example: Adding a large mirror to my small studio apartment has made a world of difference in terms of brightness.
Quality mirrors with authentic copper frames are few and far between in modern furniture stores.

vocab.word: all that glitters is not gold
vocab.meaning: không phải cái gì lấp lánh cũng là vàng (cẩn thận với vẻ ngoài)
vocab.example: I learned that all that glitters is not gold after buying a cheap, shiny mirror that distorted my reflection terribly.
